operationalLabIntro: Interactive tools to test template functionalities.
markdownLabDesc: Write Markdown and view real-time HTML preview.
markdownShortcutHint: Press Ctrl+Enter to update the preview.
internalsIntro: Internal system status and diagnostic tools.
accessibilityDesc: Colors are calculated with color-mix() and comply with WCAG 2.1 AA.
i18nDesc: Translations are loaded from local JSON files.
internalsApiDesc: Communication with the ASP.NET Core backend.
apiPlaygroundDesc: Test the getSocial() call filtered by name.
assetResolverDesc: Resolves an image ID via AssetService.
imgBuilderDesc: Create images with custom text using HTML5 canvas.
contextMenuDesc: Customizable context menu triggered by right-click or long-press on touch.
contextMenuHint: Right-click or hold in the area below to open the context menu.
contextMenuDemoArea: Right-click here to open the menu
fontGalleryDesc: Preview of all available fonts in the Image Builder. Click on a font to copy its name.
modalDemoDesc: Bootstrap modal example with confirm, alert, and form. Ready to reuse.
modalAlertBody: This is a sample informational message.
modalConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. Do you want to proceed?
speechDemoDesc: Experiment with accessibility using the integrated SpeechService.
speechPlaceholder: Write something to be read aloud...
contextMenuSampleText: This is a sample text. Select it and use the context menu to copy, cut, or paste.
